case_title: JACKSON OSCAR J. MD. VS CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JACKSON OSCAR J. MD. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $15.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,515.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
